input.background: The prevalence of a trait is 76.8%.
input.question: What is the probability of seeing nine or more individuals with this characteristic in an SRS of $n=10$?

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

prevalence.description: The proportion of individuals in the population with the characteristic.

sample_size.description: The size of the simple random sample (SRS).

threshold.description: The minimum number of individuals with the characteristic in the sample for the probability calculation.
